d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Baelran gains a shield equal to [[80%]] of his initial HP and receives [[300%]]<HP> bonus max HP. This bonus max HP does not raise Baelran's current HP and decreases by [[2%]] every second.
When Baelran is restored to his max HP, he spreads his wings, deals [[10%]]<HP> damage to enemies within 2 tiles, and enters Celestial Form. While in Celestial Form, the bonus max HP no longer decreases, and his normal attacks strike all enemies within a 1-tile arc in front of him. Baelran is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while receiving bonus max HP and while transitioning into Celestial Form.
Active. Baelran channels divine power into his blade, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> true damage to all enemies within a 3-tile arc in front of him. He then restores HP equal to [[40%]] of the damage dealt by the active strike.
Increases the damage dealt by the active strike to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by the active strike to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by the active strike to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by the active strike to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Passive. Baelran restores [[2%]]<HP> HP every second. While in Celestial Form, his blade is permanently imbued with Divine Light, dealing an extra [[1.5%]]<HP> true damage with each hit.
Increases the extra damage granted by Divine Light to [[1.8%]]<HP>.
Increases the extra damage granted by Divine Light to [[2.1%]]<HP>.
Increases the extra damage granted by Divine Light to [[2.5%]]<HP>.

Baelran knocks his target into the air with an upward slash, dealing [[180%]]<ATK> damage. He then slams his sword down, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within a 3-tile rectangular area in front of him, knocking them down for [[2]]s.
Increase the slam damage to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increase the slam damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increase the slam damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Baelran increases his Haste by [[9]] during battle, and further increases it by [[3]] whenever he enters Celestial Form or enhanced Celestial Form.
Baelran increases his Haste by [[12]] during battle, and further increases it by [[4]] whenever he enters Celestial Form or enhanced Celestial Form.
Baelran increases his Haste by [[15]] during battle, and further increases it by [[5]] whenever he enters Celestial Form or enhanced Celestial Form.

When Baelran enters Celestial Form, he fully regains the bonus max HP granted by Celestial Rise. If he is restored to max HP again, he enters an enhanced Celestial Form, dealing [[10%]]<HP> true damage to enemies within 2 tiles and becoming [[unaffected|uncontrol]] permanently.
When casting Celestial Rise, Baelran calls down Divine Light strikes on every tile within the affected area, dealing [[6%]]<HP> true damage per strike. If an enemy is hit multiple times, the damage they take from each successive strike is reduced by [[10%]].
Increases the damage dealt by each Divine Light strike to [[8%]]<HP>.
Increases the damage dealt by each Divine Light strike to [[10%]]<HP>.

When Baelran enters Celestial Form, he dispels all debuffs on himself and permanently increases his ATK by [[10%]]. Upon entering enhanced Celestial Form, Baelran calls down Divine Light strikes on every tile within 2 tiles of him, dealing [[10%]]<HP> true damage per strike to enemies hit.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Vitality, 10 Life Drain.

d: The extra damage caused by the Divine Light can also reduce the max HP of non-boss enemies by [[70%]] of the damage dealt. This max HP reduction cannot exceed [[40%]] of the target's max HP or [[800%]] of Baelran's ATK, whichever is lower. When fighting against boss enemies, this skill does not reduce max HP; instead, it causes them to lose [[0.7%]]<HP> HP.
